title: Origenceal LPackage
description: A optimized modpack, but there are not only these excellent optimizations! It has some port and can develop various extensions! Free licence! Now support 1.20.1!
body:
English：
Welcome to download this modpack! This modpack has the following features: (increased over time)
1. Provides certain optimizations for the original game and has been configured.
2. Improves the experience without affecting performance.
3. A new "Showcase" item that can now be placed in the "Exhibition."
4. In-game hints: Effects (especially for Minecraft newcomers) and enchantments are described in detail according to the [Minecraft Wiki](https://zh.minecraft.wiki/).
5. Network optimization.
6. Mining delay fix.
7. Right-click the field to harvest the field and keep the seeds.
8. Automatic pack and dynamic crosshairs.

Note: This modpack is under a free license, feel free to use it to unleash your creativity!

中文：
欢迎下载本整合包！本整合包拥有下列功能：（随着时间增加）
1. 对于原版游戏提供一定的优化，并经过配置
2. 在不影响性能的情况下对体验进行改善
3. 一个新的"陈列柜"物品，现在可以将物品放入"展览"。
4. 游戏内提示：对效果（特别是对于 Minecraft 新手）和附魔根据 [Minecraft Wiki](https://zh.minecraft.wiki/) 作了详细的描述
5. 网络优化
6. 挖矿延迟修复
7. 右键种田收田，且保留种子
8. 自动整理背包和动态准星

注意：本整合包为自由许可证，欢迎使用本整合包发挥你的创意！
